## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming board meeting presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing early positive results (e.g., "AI cement" as top query)](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Implementing lead generation funnel with gated content (e.g., "Demystifying Industrial AI" whitepaper)](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Developing AI readiness/maturity model for content and sales alignment](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Preparing board meeting presentation to showcase marketing strategy and early indicators](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

## Topics

### SEO Content Strategy Progress

  - [Publishing for \~1 month; content starting to rank after 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Curve of impressions/clicks showing steep incline in past two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Top performing query: "AI cement" - aligning with target industries](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [\~80% of current organic traffic includes "Imubit" - opportunity to expand non-branded reach](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Lead Generation Funnel Implementation

  - [Adding banners/CTAs to blog posts for mid-funnel content offers](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Creating "Executive Implementation Guide" for AI optimization in process plants](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Using "Demystifying Industrial AI" whitepaper as initial gated asset](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Aiming for 2-3% conversion rate on content downloads](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)

### AI Readiness/Maturity Model Development

  - [Creating assessment to determine customer's AI implementation readiness](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Aligning content strategy with sales process and internal terminology](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Potential for quiz-based lead qualification in the future](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Leveraging Imubit Academy for customer education on AI basics and Imubit-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)

### Board Meeting Presentation Preparation

  - [Showcasing early indicators and rationale for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Highlighting problem/solution (e.g., poor LinkedIn followers, low domain authority)](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Emphasizing importance of top-of-funnel content in the age of AI](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Providing conservative estimates of potential upside based on comparable cases](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

### Content Strategy Benefits for Sales

  - [Educating leads before sales conversations](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Providing conversation starters for sales team](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
  - [Ability to quickly create content addressing common sales objections (e.g., ROI calculations)](https://fathom.video/share/9aRrDUUXn25QRueKrYc8NrN63VyDqRzW?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)

## Next Steps
